violations.text: One of the ovens and the dishwasher are not in good repair. 3-bay sink is being used to wash, rinse, and sanitize. Maintenance ticket has been placed for repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. Test strips must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026

The dishwasher (not currently in use) is lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2025

Refrigerator door gasket of the milk chest cooler observed in poor repair, split away from the lid. Gasket is to be replaced. In addition, the door handle of the 1-door reach-in is in poor repair, pulled away from the door. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

The dishwasher is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food/food equipment is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
3-bay sink is in poor repair. Stopper seal is not holding water/sanitizer in sink. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment shall register a ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (RI license). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The middle hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Staff provided paper towels during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
Faucet of the front hand-washing sink and the sanitizing drain of the 3 bay sink were not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023

Ice buildup observed in the 2 door freezer lcoated in the back kitchen area. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Ice buildup shall be broken down to prevent blockage of cold air flow inside unit. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per interview of staff, an employee will be enrolled in food safety course. -Establishment shall register the employee as the Certified Food Safety Manager with RIDOH Center for Food Protection upon completion of food safety course and passing food safety exam. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
